entries.quoted_snippet: ![SAM design](assets/model_diagram.png?raw=true)

entries.claim_text: The note uses arXiv 2304.02643v1 full text through a text-fetchable HTML rendering for provenance checking.
entries.quoted_snippet: citation_arxiv_id" content="2304.02643"

entries.claim_text: 本文依據 arXiv:2304.02643v1 與 CVF ICCV 2023 OpenAccess 版本整理；CVF 頁面列出同一篇論文收於 Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2023, pp. 4015-4026，因此下列技術解讀把 arXiv 全文當作可檢查的主要來源，並以 CVF 版本校對出版脈絡。
entries.quoted_snippet: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2023, pp. 4015-4026

entries.claim_text: 圖中最重要的切分不是「更大的分割網路」，而是把 SAM 拆成一次性的 image encoder、可重複查詢的 prompt encoder，以及很輕的 mask decoder；這讓同一張圖的 embedding 可以被點、框、遮罩等提示反覆使用。
entries.quoted_snippet: a powerful image encoder computes an image embedding, a prompt encoder embeds prompts, and then the two information sources are combined in a lightweight mask decoder

entries.claim_text: SAM 的核心問題設定是可提示分割 (promptable segmentation)：輸入影像與任意分割提示，模型只需要回傳至少一個合理的有效遮罩。
entries.quoted_snippet: The \emph{promptable segmentation task}, then, is to return a \emph{valid} segmentation mask given any \emph{prompt}.

entries.claim_text: 有效遮罩的要求是：即使提示有歧義，輸出也應是其中至少一個可能物件的合理遮罩。
entries.quoted_snippet: even when a prompt is \emph{ambiguous} and could refer to multiple objects (\eg, recall the shirt \vs person example, and see \fig{fig:ambiguity_examples}), the output should be a reasonable mask for at least \emph{one} of those objects

entries.claim_text: SAM 的 promptable segmentation 不同於固定 semantic、instance、panoptic segmentation 任務的多任務系統。
entries.quoted_snippet: a single model performs a \emph{fixed} set of tasks, \eg, joint semantic, instance, and panoptic segmentation

entries.claim_text: SA-1B 由三階段 data engine 產生：第一階段由標註者在 SAM 輔助下畫遮罩，第二階段混合自動候選與人工補標，最後以全自動方式產生 masks。
entries.quoted_snippet: The data engine has three stages: (1) a model-assisted manual annotation stage, (2) a semi-automatic stage with a mix of automatically predicted masks and model-assisted annotation, and (3) a fully automatic stage in which our model generates masks without annotator input.

entries.claim_text: SA-1B 在 11M 授權且隱私處理的影像上產生 1.1B masks。
entries.quoted_snippet: with over 1 \textbf{billion} masks on 11M licensed and privacy respecting images.

entries.claim_text: 論文報告自動遮罩品質檢查時，隨機抽取約 500 張圖與約 50k masks 讓專業標註者修正，94% 的自動/修正遮罩配對 IoU 大於 90%。
entries.quoted_snippet: We computed IoU between each pair and found that 94% of pairs have greater than 90% IoU

entries.claim_text: 模型把影像輸入整理成 $1024\times1024$，ViT-H/16 image encoder 產生 $64\times64$ 的影像 embedding，通道經卷積降到 256。
entries.quoted_snippet: Following standard practices (\eg,~\cite{Ghiasi2021}), we use an input resolution of 1024$\x$1024 obtained by rescaling the image and padding the shorter side. The image embedding is therefore 64$\x$64. To reduce the channel dimension, following~\cite{li2022exploring}, we use a 1$\x$1 convolution to get to 256 channels, followed by a 3$\x$3 convolution also with 256 channels.

entries.claim_text: 點與框會被位置編碼加上提示類型 embedding。
entries.quoted_snippet: Sparse prompts are mapped to 256-dimensional vectorial embeddings as follows. A point is represented as the sum of a positional encoding~\cite{tancik2020fourier} of the point's location and one of two learned embeddings that indicate if the point is either in the foreground or background. A box is represented by an embedding pair

entries.claim_text: 遮罩提示以卷積下採樣成 dense prompt embedding。
entries.quoted_snippet: Dense prompts (\ie, masks) have a spatial correspondence with the image. We input masks at a 4$\x$ lower resolution than the input image, then downscale an additional 4$\x$ using two 2$\x$2, stride-2 convolutions with output channels 4 and 16, respectively. A final 1$\x$1 convolution maps the channel dimension to 256.

entries.claim_text: dense prompt embedding 會加到 image embedding 上。
entries.quoted_snippet:
src = torch.repeat_interleave(image_embeddings, tokens.shape[0], dim=0)
        src = src + dense_prompt_embeddings

entries.claim_text: mask decoder 使用兩層 two-way Transformer，透過雙向 cross-attention 更新提示 token 與影像 embedding。
entries.quoted_snippet: A two-layer decoder updates both the image embedding and prompt tokens via cross-attention

entries.claim_text: 每個 decoder layer 依序執行 token self-attention、token-to-image cross-attention、point-wise MLP、image-to-token cross-attention。
entries.quoted_snippet: Each decoder layer performs 4 steps: (1) self-attention on the tokens, (2) cross-attention from tokens (as queries) to the image embedding, (3) a point-wise MLP updates each token, and (4) cross-attention from the image embedding (as queries) to tokens.

entries.claim_text: 最後用 mask token 經 MLP 產生動態線性分類器，對 upscaled image embedding 的每個位置預測遮罩值。
entries.quoted_snippet:
for i in range(self.num_mask_tokens):
            hyper_in_list.append(self.output_hypernetworks_mlps[i](mask_tokens_out[:, i, :]))
        hyper_in = torch.stack(hyper_in_list, dim=1)
        b, c, h, w = upscaled_embedding.shape
        masks = (hyper_in @ upscaled_embedding.view(b, c, h * w)).view(b, -1, h, w)

entries.claim_text: \text{mask}_{k}(x,y)=h_k^\top E_{\text{up}}(x,y), \quad k\in\{1,2,3\}
entries.quoted_snippet: masks = (hyper_in @ upscaled_embedding.view(b, c, h * w)).view(b, -1, h, w)

entries.claim_text: 這個式子是本文對論文動態遮罩頭的摘要記號：$E_{\text{up}}$ 表示上採樣後的影像 embedding，$h_k$ 表示第 $k$ 個 mask token 經 MLP 得到的分類向量；論文實作的重點是把每個候選遮罩變成「token 產生分類器，再掃過空間 embedding」。
entries.quoted_snippet: we pass the updated output token embedding to a small 3-layer MLP

entries.claim_text: 一張圖先被轉成長邊 1024 的張量
entries.quoted_snippet:
max(*transformed_image.shape[2:]) == self.model.image_encoder.img_size
        ), f"set_torch_image input must be BCHW with long side {self.model.image_encoder.img_size}."
        self.reset_image()

        self.original_size = original_image_size
        self.input_size = tuple(transformed_image.shape[-2:])
        input_image = self.model.preprocess(transformed_image)
        self.features = self.model.image_encoder(input_image)

entries.claim_text: 經 ViT-H 編成 `1x256x64x64` embedding
entries.quoted_snippet:
Returns the image embeddings for the currently set image, with
        shape 1xCxHxW, where C is the embedding dimension and (H,W) are
        the embedding spatial dimension of SAM (typically C=256, H=W=64).

entries.claim_text: 公開建構入口的預設 SAM 是 ViT-H 版本。
entries.quoted_snippet: build_sam = build_sam_vit_h

entries.claim_text: SAM 預設 prompt embedding dimension 是 256。
entries.quoted_snippet:
prompt_embed_dim = 256
    image_size = 1024
    vit_patch_size = 16

entries.claim_text: 一個前景點 `(x,y)` 會經位置編碼與 foreground 類型 embedding 形成 256 維 point embedding，沒有 box 時公開 predictor 會再補一個 padding point token
entries.quoted_snippet:
if pad:
            padding_point = torch.zeros((points.shape[0], 1, 2), device=points.device)
            padding_label = -torch.ones((labels.shape[0], 1), device=labels.device)
            points = torch.cat([points, padding_point], dim=1)
            labels = torch.cat([labels, padding_label], dim=1)
        point_embedding = self.pe_layer.forward_with_coords(points, self.input_image_size)
        point_embedding[labels == -1] = 0.0
        point_embedding[labels == -1] += self.not_a_point_embed.weight
        point_embedding[labels == 0] += self.point_embeddings[0].weight
        point_embedding[labels == 1] += self.point_embeddings[1].weight

entries.claim_text: 沒有 box 時，point embedding 呼叫會以 `pad=(boxes is None)` 補 padding point token。
entries.quoted_snippet:
if points is not None:
            coords, labels = points
            point_embeddings = self._embed_points(coords, labels, pad=(boxes is None))
            sparse_embeddings = torch.cat([sparse_embeddings, point_embeddings], dim=1)

entries.claim_text: 沒有遮罩提示時 dense prompt 會展開到 image embedding 的空間大小，因此在 SAM 預設下是 `1x256x64x64`。
entries.quoted_snippet:
dense_embeddings = self.no_mask_embed.weight.reshape(1, -1, 1, 1).expand(
                bs, -1, self.image_embedding_size[0], self.image_embedding_size[1]

entries.claim_text: decoder 會把 IoU token、4 個 mask tokens 與 sparse prompt tokens 串接
entries.quoted_snippet:
output_tokens = torch.cat([self.iou_token.weight, self.mask_tokens.weight], dim=0)
        output_tokens = output_tokens.unsqueeze(0).expand(sparse_prompt_embeddings.size(0), -1, -1)
        tokens = torch.cat((output_tokens, sparse_prompt_embeddings), dim=1)

entries.claim_text: MaskDecoder 的公開實作預設 `num_multimask_outputs=3`。
entries.quoted_snippet: num_multimask_outputs: int = 3

entries.claim_text: mask token 數量等於 `num_multimask_outputs + 1`，因此預設為 4。
entries.quoted_snippet: self.num_mask_tokens = num_multimask_outputs + 1

entries.claim_text: SAM 建構 mask decoder 時使用 depth=2 的 TwoWayTransformer。
entries.quoted_snippet: depth=2,

entries.claim_text: 當 `multimask_output=True` 時，公開介面回傳 3 張遮罩
entries.quoted_snippet: multimask_output (bool): If true, the model will return three masks.

entries.claim_text: 公開介面回傳品質分數與可供下一輪提示使用的低解析度 `Cx256x256` logits。
entries.quoted_snippet:
Returns:
          (torch.Tensor): The output masks in BxCxHxW format, where C is the
            number of masks, and (H, W) is the original image size.
          (torch.Tensor): An array of shape BxC containing the model's
            predictions for the quality of each mask.
          (torch.Tensor): An array of shape BxCxHxW, where C is the number
            of masks and H=W=256. These low res logits can be passed to
            a subsequent iteration as mask input.

entries.claim_text: Single-point 23 datasets | 1 個中心點提示，mIoU 與人工評分 | 16/23 datasets 高於 RITM；oracle 選 3 個候選中最接近 ground truth 時全數高於 RITM | RITM、FocalClick、SimpleClick
entries.quoted_snippet: SAM yields higher results on 16 of the 23 datasets

entries.claim_text: Single-point 23 datasets | oracle 選 3 個候選中最接近 ground truth 時全數高於 RITM
entries.quoted_snippet: with the oracle to perform ambiguity resolution, \sam outperforms RITM on \emph{all} datasets.

entries.claim_text: Single-point 23 datasets | 對照包含 RITM、FocalClick、SimpleClick
entries.quoted_snippet: shows additional baselines, SimpleClick~\cite{liu2022simpleclick} and FocalClick~\cite{chen2022focalclick}

entries.claim_text: BSDS500 edge detection | 16x16 grid 產生 768 masks，再從 mask probability 取邊 | ODS .768、OIS .786、AP .794、R50 .928 | HED ODS .788；EDETR ODS .840
entries.quoted_snippet: Specifically, we prompt \sam with a 16$\x$16 regular grid of foreground points resulting in 768 predicted masks (3 per point). Redundant masks are removed by NMS. Then, edge maps are computed using Sobel filtering of unthresholded mask probability maps and standard lightweight postprocessing, including edge NMS

entries.claim_text: BSDS500 edge detection | ODS .768、OIS .786、AP .794、R50 .928 | HED ODS .788；EDETR ODS .840
BSDS500 edge detection | 對照 HED ODS .788
entries.quoted_snippet: HED~\cite{xie2015holistically} & 2015& .788 & .808 & .840 & .923

entries.claim_text: BSDS500 edge detection | 對照 EDETR ODS .840
LVIS object proposals | AR@1000，zero-shot masks proposal | all 59.3、medium 81.6、large 86.9、rare 65.8 | ViTDet-H all 63.0、medium 80.8、large 87.0、rare 58.3
LVIS object proposals | ViTDet-H all 63.0、medium 80.8、large 87.0、rare 58.3
LVIS object proposals 是以 SAM automatic mask generation pipeline 的修改版輸出 masks as proposals。
entries.quoted_snippet: To generate object proposals, we run a slightly modified version of our automatic mask generation pipeline and output the masks as proposals

entries.claim_text: Instance segmentation | 用 ViTDet boxes 提示 SAM | COCO AP 46.5；LVIS AP 44.7 | ViTDet-H COCO AP 51.0；LVIS AP 46.6
Instance segmentation | ViTDet-H COCO AP 51.0；LVIS AP 46.6
結果的讀法要小心：SAM 在 open-world proposal 與遮罩品質上很強，但它不是在所有既有指標上壓過專用模型。
entries.quoted_snippet: certainly behind ViTDet

entries.claim_text: 把分割改寫成可提示介面是有實際價值的，因為許多下游系統已經能產生點、框、文字或候選區域，卻缺少一個通用且可組合的遮罩模組。
entries.quoted_snippet: The effect is to create a reliable interface between SAM and other components.

entries.claim_text: 論文的評估面涵蓋五個 zero-shot transfer 任務，其中四個明顯不同於訓練用的 promptable segmentation task。
entries.quoted_snippet: We consider five tasks, four of which differ significantly from the promptable segmentation task

entries.claim_text: 論文用 23 個資料集評估 single-point prompt 的 mIoU。
entries.quoted_snippet: We use a newly compiled suite of 23 datasets with diverse image distributions

entries.claim_text: 評估包含 edge detection、object proposal generation、instance segmentation 與 free-form text-to-mask proof-of-concept。
entries.quoted_snippet: perform edge detection, (2) segment everything, \ie object proposal generation, (3) segment detected objects, \ie instance segmentation, and (4), as a proof-of-concept, to segment objects from free-form text

entries.claim_text: 論文在 BSDS500 上評估 zero-shot edge detection。
entries.quoted_snippet: We evaluate SAM on the classic low-level task of edge detection using BSDS500

entries.claim_text: 論文在 LVIS v1 上以 AR@1000 評估 object proposal generation。
entries.quoted_snippet: We compute the standard average recall (AR) metric on LVIS v1

entries.claim_text: 論文在 COCO 與 LVIS 上比較 SAM 和 ViTDet 的 instance segmentation masks。
entries.quoted_snippet: We compare the masks predicted by SAM and ViTDet on COCO and LVIS

entries.claim_text: 論文用人類評分補充 mIoU，讓 annotators 以 1 到 10 評估 mask quality。
entries.quoted_snippet: a human study in which annotators rate mask quality from 1 (nonsense) to 10 (pixel-perfect)

entries.claim_text: 論文在 23-dataset suite 上做多個 ablations。
entries.quoted_snippet: We perform several ablations on our 23 dataset suite

entries.claim_text: edge detection 流程需要把 768 個 masks 再做 Sobel 與 NMS。
entries.quoted_snippet: We prompt \sam with a 16$\x$16 regular grid of foreground points, which yields 768 predicted masks (three per point). We do not filter by predicted IoU or stability. Redundant masks are removed by NMS. Then we apply a Sobel filter to the remaining masks' unthresholded probability maps

entries.claim_text: object proposal 流程調整 input point grid 與 NMS threshold。
entries.quoted_snippet: This leaves two tunable parameters to get \app1000 masks per image: the input point grid and the NMS threshold duplicate mask suppression. We choose a 64$\x$64 point grid and an NMS threshold of 0.9

entries.claim_text: 從模型積木看，ViT image encoder、prompt embedding、Transformer decoder、focal/dice loss、multi-mask minimum loss 都有前例；真正的新意是把 ambiguity-aware promptable task、可互動的 decoder、以及能自我擴張的 SA-1B data engine 放在同一個閉環裡。
entries.quoted_snippet: We introduce the Segment Anything (SA) project: a new task, model, and dataset for image segmentation.

entries.claim_text: 作者清楚指出單點提示有歧義，並加入 human study 與 oracle 評估來補 mIoU 的盲點，這是合理的；但 oracle 指標本質上替模型選了最接近 ground truth 的候選，較接近「候選集合品質」而不是「模型第一答案品質」。
entries.quoted_snippet: This reveals the impact of ambiguity on automatic evaluation.

entries.claim_text: SA-1B 的 11M images 與 1.1B masks
entries.quoted_snippet: with over 1 \textbf{billion} masks on 11M licensed and privacy respecting images.

entries.claim_text: 地理代表性
entries.quoted_snippet: While \sad is more geographically diverse than many of its predecessors, we acknowledge that some geographic regions and economic groups are underrepresented.

entries.claim_text: 論文模型卡也寫明 released SAM 訓練使用 256 A100 GPUs 68 小時
entries.quoted_snippet: \sam was trained on 256 A100 GPUS for 68 hours. We acknowledge the environmental impact and cost of training large scale models.
